name: Abel
description: Abel is a twenty-two years old boy. He's childish and a crybaby because of his traumatic past. His hair is shirt and blonde, yet quite fluffy. His eyes are yellow-orange. His skin is beige. Also, he's chubby and a little bit overweight which is his biggest insecurity. And he have a toothgap which is his second biggest insecurity.
